content:
# Session 38 (iter-038) — recommendations

## Headline
**Remain in terminal closeout / await merge.** No closable in-cone sorry exists. 2nd consecutive
no-prover-lane iter; this is the correct steady state, not a stall.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked, deferred since iter-001)
- `QuotScheme.lean` 4 χ sorries (L126/165/201/228 — `hilbertPolynomial`, Quot functor, Grassmannian
  re-exports). Genuinely χ-blocked (`Σ_i(-1)^i dim Hⁱ` + Snapper); needs a scheme-cohomology engine this
  H⁰ leg deliberately lacks (Mathlib gap). Plan re-verified by READING the body — do NOT re-probe.
- `RelativeSpec.lean` sorries — out-of-cone parent code (iter-173–179 lineage). Not this leg's scope.
- Do NOT unilaterally open the cohomology megaleg: strategy-critic-validated scope boundary; only open via
  USER_HINTS.

## Reverse signals (only these justify a prover dispatch)
1. USER_HINTS.md opens cohomology / RelativeSpec scope.
2. A genuine in-cone sorry surfaces (would contradict current verification — none exists now).

## Coverage debt (merge-time, NOT this leg)
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 356 `lean_aux` nodes (all `proved:true`, `chapter:''`), inherited
  parent-construction decls present from extraction but blueprinted in the parent. Re-blueprinting here
  duplicates the parent ⇒ merge-time work per ARCHON_MEMORY. Do not author entries in this short-lived leg.

## Blueprint doctor (out-of-cone — do NOT edit)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`: 2 phantom `% archon:covers` (non-existent `FlatBaseChange.lean`,
  `FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean`) + 14 broken `\ref`. `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`: 4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`.
  `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`: 13 broken `\cref`. All on dormant out-of-cone inherited chapters — merge-back
  artifacts; parent reconciles. No prover near them ⇒ harmless this iter.

## Subagent / blueprint actions
- None owed. No prover work ⇒ HARD GATE moot; active SGR chapter cleared iter-036 (complete+correct).
